# StepLeague

> StepLeague is a competitive step-tracking league platform where users form leagues with friends, family, or coworkers and compete weekly using daily step counts. Available as a progressive web app at stepleague.app.

## Core Pages
- [How It Works](https://stepleague.app/how-it-works): Step-by-step guide to creating leagues, inviting friends, and competing in weekly step challenges
- [Pricing](https://stepleague.app/pricing): Free and premium plan details for individuals and teams
- [Step Challenge App](https://stepleague.app/step-challenge-app): Main landing page — create step challenges, track progress, compete with friends

## Team & Workplace
- [Teams](https://stepleague.app/teams): Team step challenge features for organizations and corporate wellness programs
- [Team Features](https://stepleague.app/teams/features): Detailed breakdown of team functionality including analytics and leaderboards
- [Workplace Step Challenge](https://stepleague.app/workplace-step-challenge): Corporate wellness step challenge solution for employee engagement

## SEO Landing Pages
- [Walking Challenge with Friends](https://stepleague.app/walking-challenge-with-friends): How to set up and run walking challenges with friends using StepLeague
- [Why Upload Steps](https://stepleague.app/why-upload): Benefits of uploading step proof screenshots for fair competition

## Comparisons
- [Compare Step Challenge Apps](https://stepleague.app/compare): Side-by-side comparison of StepLeague with other step challenge apps
- [StepLeague vs Fitbit](https://stepleague.app/compare/stepleague-vs-fitbit): Feature comparison with Fitbit challenges
- [StepLeague vs Strava](https://stepleague.app/compare/stepleague-vs-strava): Feature comparison with Strava challenges
- [StepLeague vs Yumuuv](https://stepleague.app/compare/stepleague-vs-yumuuv): Feature comparison with Yumuuv
- [StepLeague vs Garmin](https://stepleague.app/compare/stepleague-vs-garmin): Feature comparison with Garmin Connect challenges
- [StepLeague vs Apple Fitness](https://stepleague.app/compare/stepleague-vs-apple-fitness): Feature comparison with Apple Fitness competitions
- [StepLeague vs Stridekick](https://stepleague.app/compare/stepleague-vs-stridekick): Feature comparison with Stridekick

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://stepleague.app/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling practices
- [Terms of Service](https://stepleague.app/terms): Terms and conditions of use
- [Security](https://stepleague.app/security): Security practices and data protection measures

## Optional
- [Roadmap](https://stepleague.app/roadmap): Public product roadmap and upcoming features
- [How to Share](https://stepleague.app/how-to-share): Guide to sharing achievements and stats on social media
- [Stage Info](https://stepleague.app/stage-info): Information about competition stages and progression system
